name: Adamantine Armor
description: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. While you're wearing it, any Critical Hit against you becomes a normal hit.
subtype: Any Medium or Heavy, Except Hide Armor
properties: Critical hits against you become normal hits

name: Adamantine Weapon
description: This weapon or piece of ammunition is made of adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. Whenever this weapon or piece of ammunition hits an object, the hit is a Critical Hit.
properties: Hits to objects are Critical Hits

name: Alchemy Jug
description: This ceramic jug appears to be able to hold a gallon of liquid and weighs 12 pounds whether full or empty. The jug sloshes when it is shaken, even if the jug is empty. You can take a Magic action and name one liquid from the Alchemy Jug Liquids table to cause the jug to produce the chosen liquid. Afterward, you can uncork the jug as a Utilize action and pour that liquid out, up to 2 gallons per minute.

name: Alchemy Jug Liquids
description: Various liquids the Alchemy Jug can produce.

name: Ammunition of Slaying
description: This magic ammunition is meant to slay creatures of a particular type, which the DM chooses or determines randomly. If a creature of that type takes damage from the ammunition, the creature makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking an extra 6d10 Force damage on a failed save or half as much extra damage on a successful one. After dealing its extra damage to a creature, the ammunition becomes nonmagical.
properties: Extra 6d10 Force damage vs target creature type

name: Amulet of Health
description: Your Constitution is 19 while you wear this amulet. It has no effect on you if your Constitution is 19 or higher without it.

name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location
description: While wearing this amulet, you can't be targeted by Divination spells or perceived through magical scrying sensors unless you allow it.

name: Amulet of the Animated Shield
description: While holding this Shield, you can take a Bonus Action to cause it to animate. The Shield leaps into the air and hovers in your space to protect you as if you were wielding it, leaving your hands free. The Shield remains animate for 1 minute.

name: Amulet of the Planes
description: While wearing this amulet, you can take a Magic action to name a location that you are familiar with on another plane of existence. Then make a DC 15 Intelligence (Arcana) check. On a successful check, you cast Plane Shift.

name: Apparatus of Kwalish
description: This item first appears to be a sealed iron barrel weighing 500 pounds. The barrel has a hidden catch, which can be found with a successful DC 20 Intelligence (Investigation) check. Ten levers control its transformation and functions.
properties: Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage

name: Armor of Gleaming
description: This armor never gets dirty.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
description: You have Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage while you wear this armor. You can take a Magic action to give yourself Immunity to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage for 10 minutes or until you are no longer wearing the armor. Once this property is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Armor of Resistance
description: You have Resistance to one type of damage while you wear this armor. The DM chooses the type or determines it randomly.
properties: Resistance to one damage type (DM choice)

name: Armor of Vulnerability
description: While wearing this armor, you have Resistance to one of the following damage types: Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing. Curse. This armor is cursed. While cursed, you have Vulnerability to two of the three damage types associated with the armor.
properties: Vulnerability to two types when cursed

name: Armor, +1, +2, or +3
description: You have a bonus to Armor Class while wearing this armor. The bonus is determined by its rarity.

name: Arrow-Catching Shield
description: You gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class against ranged attack rolls while you wield this Shield. Whenever an attacker makes a ranged attack roll against a target within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to become the target of the attack instead.

name: Axe of the Dwarvish Lords
description: An Artifact. Magic Weapon. Grants +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a natural 20, deals extra 20 Slashing damage. Has the Thrown property. While attuned, you gain Darkvision, Fortitude of Stone (Con +2), tool proficiencies, Immunity to Poison, Resistance to Fire, and can Conjure Earth Elemental.

name: Baba Yaga's Dancing Broom
description: While holding the broom, you can take a Magic action to transform it into an Animated Broom under your control. The broom remains animate until you take a Bonus Action to end the effect.
properties: Regains HP if reverted before destruction

name: Bag of Beans
description: This heavy cloth bag contains 3d4 dry beans. If you dump one or more beans out of the bag, they explode in a 10-foot-radius sphere, dealing 5d4 Force damage. Each bean produces a different effect when planted and watered.

name: Bag of Devouring
description: This bag resembles a Bag of Holding but is a feeding orifice for a gigantic extradimensional creature. When part of a living creature is placed in the bag, there is a 50 percent chance the creature is pulled inside.

name: Bag of Holding
description: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. The bag weighs 5 pounds, regardless of its contents.

name: Bag of Tricks
description: This bag made from gray, rust, or tan cloth appears empty. You can take a Magic action to pull a fuzzy object from the bag and throw it. When the object lands, it transforms into a creature.
properties: Gray: Weasel, Giant Rat, Badger, Boar, Panther, Giant Badger, Dire Wolf, Giant Elk
Rust: Rat, Owl, Mastiff, Goat, Giant Goat, Giant Boar, Lion, Brown Bear
Tan: Jackal, Ape, Baboon, Axe Beak, Black Bear, Giant Weasel, Giant Hyena, Tiger

name: Bead of Force
description: This small black sphere measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. You can take a Magic action to throw the bead up to 60 feet. The bead explodes in a 10-foot-radius Sphere, dealing 5d4 Force damage.

name: Bead of Nourishment
description: This flavorless, gelatinous bead dissolves on your tongue and provides as much nourishment as 1 day of Rations.

name: Bead of Refreshment
description: This flavorless, gelatinous bead dissolves in liquid, transforming up to a pint of the liquid into fresh, cold drinking water.
properties: Transforms water to fresh drinking water

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
description: While wearing this belt, you know Dwarvish, have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks with dwarves and duergar, and your Constitution increases by 2. Non-dwarves also gain Darkvision 60 ft. and Resistance to Poison.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
description: While wearing this belt, your Strength changes to a score granted by the belt. The type of giant determines the score.

name: Berserker Axe
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls. While attuned, your Hit Point maximum increases by 1 for each level. This weapon is cursed. While berserk, you must attack the nearest creature.
properties: Cursed - unwilling to part with weapon

name: Blackrazor
description: An Artifact. You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. If you hit an Undead, you take 1d10 Necrotic damage and the target regains 1d10 Hit Points. Devours souls on killing hits.

name: Book of Exalted Deeds
description: An Artifact. A heavy clasp keeps the book secure. Only a creature attuned to the book can release the clasp. After 80 hours of reading, you gain various benefits.
properties: Spell slots count one level higher

name: Book of Vile Darkness
description: An Artifact. Contains knowledge so horrid that to even glimpse the scrawled pages invites doom. One ability score increases by 2 (max 24), another decreases by 2 (min 3).
properties: Can cast Animate Dead, Circle of Death, Dominate Monster, Finger of Death

name: Boots of Elvenkind
description: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound. You also have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

name: Boots of False Tracks
description: While wearing these boots, you can have them leave tracks like those of any kind of Humanoid of your size.
properties: Leave tracks of chosen Humanoid type

name: Boots of Levitation
description: While you wear these boots, you can cast Levitate on yourself.

name: Boots of Speed
description: While you wear these boots, you can take a Bonus Action to click the boots' heels together. If you do, the boots double your Speed, and any creature that makes an Opportunity Attack against you has Disadvantage.
properties: Disadvantage on Opportunity Attacks against you

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
description: While you wear these boots, your Speed becomes 30 feet unless your Speed is higher, and your Speed isn't reduced by carrying excess weight or wearing Heavy Armor.
properties: Not reduced by weight or Heavy Armor
Jump 30 ft. for 10 ft. of movement

name: Boots of the Winterlands
description: While wearing them, you have Resistance to Cold damage and can tolerate temperatures of 0 degrees Fahrenheit or lower. You ignore Difficult Terrain created by ice or snow.

name: Bowl of Commanding Water Elementals
description: While this bowl is filled with water and you are within 5 feet of it, you can take a Magic action to summon a Water Elemental.

name: Bracers of Archery
description: While wearing these bracers, you have proficiency with the Longbow and Shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls made with such weapons.

name: Bracers of Defense
description: While wearing these bracers, you gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class if you are wearing no armor and using no Shield.

name: Brazier of Commanding Fire Elementals
description: While you are within 5 feet of this brazier, you can take a Magic action to summon a Fire Elemental.

name: Brooch of Shielding
description: While wearing this brooch, you have Resistance to Force damage, and you have Immunity to damage from the Magic Missile spell.

name: Broom of Flying
description: This wooden broom functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and take a Magic action to make it hover beneath you. It has a Fly Speed of 50 feet. It can carry up to 400 pounds.
properties: Fly Speed 50 ft. (30 ft. over 200 lbs)
Can send broom to named location within 1 mile

name: Candle of Invocation
description: After burning for 4 hours, the candle is destroyed. While lit, the candle sheds Dim Light in a 30-foot radius. While you are within that light, you have Advantage on D20 Tests.
properties: Advantage on D20 Tests in light
Cleric/Druid can cast prepared spells without slots

name: Candle of the Deep
description: The flame of this candle isn't extinguished when immersed in water. It gives off light and heat like a normal candle.

name: Cape of Water Breathing
description: While wearing this cap underwater, you can take a Magic action to create a bubble of air around your head. This bubble allows you to breathe normally underwater.

name: Cape of the Mountebank
description: While wearing it, you can use it to cast Dimension Door as a Magic action. This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Carpet of Flying
description: You can make this carpet hover and fly by taking a Magic action. Four sizes exist: 3x5 ft (200 lbs, 80 ft), 4x6 ft (400 lbs, 60 ft), 5x7 ft (600 lbs, 40 ft), 6x9 ft (800 lbs, 30 ft).

name: Cast-off Armor
description: You can doff this armor as a Magic action.

name: Cauldron of Rebirth
description: This Tiny pot bears relief scenes of heroes on its cast-iron sides. You can use the cauldron as a Spellcasting Focus for your spells.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Druid or Warlock

name: Censer of Controlling Air Elementals
description: While gently swinging this censer, you can take a Magic action to summon an Air Elemental.

name: Charlatan's Die
description: Whenever you roll this six-sided die, you can control which number it rolls.

name: Chime of Opening
description: As a Magic action, you can strike the chime to cast Knock. The spell's customary knocking sound is replaced by the clear, ringing tone of the chime, which is audible out to 300 feet.

name: Circlet of Blasting
description: While wearing this circlet, you can cast Scorching Ray with it (+5 to hit). The circlet can't cast this spell again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
description: While wearing it, you have Resistance to Poison damage, Spider Climb (Climb Speed equal to your Speed), and Spider Walk (immune to webs). You can cast Web (save DC 13).

name: Cloak of Billowing
description: While wearing this cloak, you can take a Bonus Action to make it billow dramatically for 1 minute.

name: Cloak of Displacement
description: While you wear this cloak, it magically projects an illusion that makes you appear to be standing in a place near your actual location, causing any creature to have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description: While you wear this cloak, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to perceive you have Disadvantage, and you have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
properties: Disadvantage on Perception checks to notice you

name: Cloak of Invisibility
description: This cloak has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the cloak, you can take a Magic action to pull its hood over your head and expend 1 charge to give yourself the Invisible condition for 1 hour.

name: Cloak of Many Fashions
description: While wearing this cloak, you can take a Bonus Action to change the style, color, and apparent quality of the garment.

name: Cloak of Protection
description: You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class and saving throws while you wear this cloak.

name: Cloak of the Bat
description: While wearing this cloak, you have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks. In Dim Light or Darkness, you can gain a Fly Speed of 40 feet. You can cast Polymorph on yourself, shape-shifting into a Bat.
properties: Fly Speed 40 ft. in Dim Light/Darkness

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
description: While wearing this cloak, you can breathe underwater, and you have a Swim Speed of 60 feet.

name: Clockwork Amulet
description: When you make an attack roll while wearing the amulet, you can forgo rolling the d20 to get a 10 on the die. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Clothes of Mending
description: This elegant outfit magically mends itself to counteract daily wear and tear. Pieces of the outfit that are destroyed can't be repaired in this way.

name: Crystal Ball
description: While touching this crystal orb, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17) with it.

name: Crystal Ball of Mind Reading
description: While touching this crystal orb, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17) with it. In addition, you can cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 17) targeting creatures you can see within 30 feet.

name: Crystal Ball of Telepathy
description: While touching this crystal orb, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17) with it. In addition, you can communicate telepathically with creatures you can see within 30 feet of the spell's sensor.

name: Crystal Ball of True Seeing
description: While touching this crystal orb, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17) with it. In addition, you have Truesight with a range of 120 feet centered on the spell's sensor.

name: Cube of Force
description: This cube is about an inch across. Each face has a distinct marking. You can press one of those faces, expend the number of charges required for it, and thereby cast the spell associated with it.

name: Cube of Gate
description: This cube is 3 inches across and radiates palpable magical energy. The six sides of the cube are each keyed to a different plane of existence.

name: Cube of Summoning
description: This Tiny cube looks like a jack-in-the-box. When you wind its crank as a Magic action, a creature appears in the nearest unoccupied space.

name: Daern's Instant Fortress
description: As a Magic action, you can place this 1-inch adamantine statuette on the ground and, using a command word, cause it to grow rapidly into a square adamantine tower.
properties: 20 ft x 20 ft x 30 ft tower

name: Dagger of Venom
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. You can take a Bonus Action to magically coat the blade with poison.
properties: Coat blade with poison (2d10 Poison damage)

name: Dancing Sword
description: You can take a Bonus Action to toss this magic weapon into the air. When you do so, the weapon begins to hover, flies up to 30 feet, and attacks one creature of your choice within 5 feet of itself.
subtype: Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, or Shortsword

name: Dark-Shard Amulet
description: This amulet is fashioned from a shard of resilient material originating from an otherworldly realm. While you are wearing it, you gain the following benefits.
properties: Cast unknown Warlock cantrip (DC 10 Intelligence check)

name: Decanter of Endless Water
description: This stoppered flask sloshes when shaken, as if it contains water. You can take a Magic action to remove the stopper and issue one of three command words.

name: Deck of Illusions
description: This box contains a set of cards. A full deck has 34 cards: 32 depicting specific creatures and two with a mirrored surface.

name: Deck of Many Things
description: Usually found in a box or pouch, this deck contains a number of cards made of ivory or vellum. Most (75 percent) of these decks have thirteen cards, but some have twenty-two.
properties: Balance, Comet, Donjon, Euryale, Fates, Flames, Fool, Gem, Jester, Key, Knight, Moon, Puzzle, Rogue, Ruin, Sage, Skull, Star, Sun, Talons, Throne, Void

name: Defender
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The first time you attack with the weapon on each of your turns, you can transfer some or all of the weapon's bonus to your Armor Class.

name: Demon Armor
description: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class, and you know Abyssal. The armor's clawed gauntlets allow your Unarmed Strikes to deal 1d8 Slashing damage.
properties: Cursed - can't doff without Remove Curse

name: Demonomicon of Iggwilv
description: An Artifact. This treatise, composed by Iggwilv the archmage, documents the Abyss's layers and inhabitants.

name: Dimensional Shackles
description: This iron shackle has a small door that opens and closes with a command word. You can take a Magic action to open the door, place a creature's limb through it, and close the door. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be bound by the shackle. The shackles can't be broken and can't be removed from the creature. The creature can take a Magic action to make a DC 20 Strength check to free itself.
properties: DC 15 Strength save to be bound
DC 20 Strength check to free self
Has a second shackle for anchoring

name: Dragon Scale Mail
description: This armor is made from the scales of a specific dragon type. You have Resistance to one damage type associated with that dragon type. You have Advantage on saving throws against the Frightened condition imposed by the dragon type's breath weapon.
properties: Advantage on saves vs dragon's breath weapon Frightened condition
Dragon types: Black (acid), Blue (lightning), Brass (fire), Bronze (lightning), Copper (acid), Gold (fire), Green (poison), Red (fire), Silver (cold), White (cold)

name: Driftglobe
description: This 6-inch-diameter sphere made of glass or crystal hovers in the air when you take a Magic action. It sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. You can take a Magic action to change the light to any color. The globe hovers up to 100 feet above you and follows you if you move more than 100 feet away.
properties: Hovers up to 100 feet above you
Change light color as Magic action

name: Dust of Disappearance
description: This small pouch contains dust that you can throw to make yourself and up to five other creatures Invisible for 1 hour or until the dust is shaken off. The effect ends if a creature attacks or casts a spell.
properties: Lasts 1 hour or until shaken off
Ends if creature attacks or casts spell

name: Dust of Dryness
description: This pouch contains dust that absorbs water. You can throw the dust on water to absorb up to 10 gallons. The dust can also be used to absorb moisture from the air in an area, creating a dry zone.
properties: Absorbs up to 10 gallons of water

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
description: This pouch contains dust that causes creatures to sneeze and choke when thrown. Creatures in a 20-foot-radius sphere must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be unable to take reactions until the end of their next turn.
properties: Creatures can't take reactions until end of next turn

name: Efreeti Bottle
description: This sealed brass bottle contains an Efreeti bound to serve the creature that releases it. The Efreeti can be summoned and commanded to perform tasks. It can cast spells and has various abilities. The Efreeti returns to the bottle after 1 hour or when its tasks are completed.
properties: Returns after 1 hour or task completion
Can be used to summon once per day

name: Elemental Gem
description: This gemstone contains a small Elemental creature of a specific type. While holding the gem, you can take a Magic action to break it, releasing the Elemental. The Elemental obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Elven Chain
description: This chain shirt is woven from mithral and elven steel. You have a +1 bonus to Armor Class while wearing this armor. If you are a Elf or Half-Elf, you can cast Invisibility (self only) with it once per day.
properties: Cast Invisibility (self only) once per day
Best for Elf or Half-Elf characters

name: Eversmoking Bottle
description: This ceramic bottle produces a cloud of smoke when its stopper is removed. The smoke fills a 30-foot cube and remains for 10 minutes. The bottle can be reclosed to stop the smoke from spreading.
properties: Can be reclosed to stop smoke

name: Eyes of Charming
description: While wearing these lenses, you can cast Charm Person (save DC 13) once per day by focusing your gaze on a creature within 30 feet of you.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
description: While wearing these lenses, you can see details as small as 1 inch across at ranges up to 30 feet. You have Advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks to find or examine secret doors, traps, or hidden objects.
properties: See details as small as 1 inch at 30 feet
Advantage on Investigation for secret doors/traps/hidden objects

name: Eyes of the Eagle
description: While wearing these lenses, your vision extends to 1 mile. You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
properties: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks relying on sight

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ebony Eagle)
description: This ebony figurine of an eagle can be activated by speaking its command word. The eagle springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 16, 47 Hit Points, Fly Speed 60 feet, and can dive-bomb enemies.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Golden Snake)
description: This golden figurine of a snake can be activated by speaking its command word. The snake springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 14, 33 Hit Points, and can strike venomously.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Ivory Serpent)
description: This ivory figurine of a serpent can be activated by speaking its command word. The serpent springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 13, 26 Hit Points, and can strike with venomous fangs.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Jade Frog)
description: This jade figurine of a frog can be activated by speaking its command word. The frog springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 12, 27 Hit Points, and can swallow enemies whole.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Obsidian Leopard)
description: This obsidian figurine of a leopard can be activated by speaking its command word. The leopard springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 14, 33 Hit Points, and can make deadly claw and bite attacks.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Onyx Dog)
description: This onyx figurine of a dog can be activated by speaking its command word. The dog springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 13, 26 Hit Points, and can track by scent.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Sapphire Blue Wolf)
description: This sapphire figurine of a wolf can be activated by speaking its command word. The wolf springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 14, 33 Hit Points, and can make deadly bite attacks.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Abear)
description: This silver figurine of a bear can be activated by speaking its command word. The bear springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 15, 45 Hit Points, and can make two claw attacks (1d6+3 Bludgeoning damage each).

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Bull)
description: This silver figurine of a bull can be activated by speaking its command word. The bull springs to life and obeys your commands for 1 hour. It has AC 16, 67 Hit Points, and can gore or trample opponents.

name: Flame Tongue
description: You can take a Bonus Action to cause the blade of this sword to emit a bright flame. While the sword is ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 Fire damage to any target it hits. The flame lasts until you take a Bonus Action to extinguish it.
properties: Emit bright flame as Bonus Action

name: Folding Boat
description: This 4-foot-long model of a rowboat unfolds magically to become a full-sized vessel. It can hold up to 8 creatures and has a rowing speed of 3 miles per hour.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
description: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. It has no effect on you if your Strength is 19 or higher without them.

name: Gem of Brightness
description: This gem can be worn as a headband. It sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet while worn. While wearing it, you can take a Magic action to make it Invisible.
properties: Sheds Bright Light in 30 ft. radius
Can be made Invisible as Magic action

name: Gem of Seeing
description: This gem can be worn as a headband. While wearing it, you have Truesight with a range of 30 feet.

name: Giant Slayer
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a Giant with this weapon, you deal extra 1d8 damage to the Giant. On a natural 20, the target takes an extra 3d8 damage.
properties: Extra 3d8 damage on natural 20 vs Giants

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
description: This armor appears to be mundane studded leather until you speak the command word. While wearing this armor, you have a +1 bonus to Armor Class. You can cast Disguise Self with it once per day.
properties: Cast Disguise Self once per day

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
description: While wearing these gloves, you gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class against ranged weapon attacks. When a creature hits you with a ranged weapon attack, you can use your Reaction to catch the missile.
properties: Can catch ranged weapons as Reaction

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
description: While wearing these gloves, your Speed isn't reduced by wearing armor or carrying a shield. You have a Swim Speed equal to your Speed and can climb without making ability checks.
properties: Swim Speed equal to your Speed

name: Gloves of Thievery
description: While wearing these gloves, you have Advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks and Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide.
properties: Advantage on Sleight of Hand checks
Advantage on Stealth checks to hide

name: Goggles of Night
description: While wearing these goggles, you have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet. If you already have Darkvision, its range increases by 60 feet.

name: Golem Manual
description: This book contains instructions for creating a specific type of Golem. A creature that studies the manual for 8 hours can create that type of Golem. The manual is destroyed in the process.
properties: Instructions for creating specific Golem type

name: Grappling Hook of the Deep
description: This grappling hook is made of a lightweight, noncorrosive metal. It has a 30-foot chain attached. When thrown, it expands to a 3-foot-wide hook. It can be used underwater and returns to your hand when you will it to do so.

name: Greatsword of Sharpness
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. On a natural 20, the weapon cuts the target in two. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is sliced into several pieces.
properties: Effective against Large or smaller creatures

name: Guardian Emblem
description: This small metal emblem can be worn as a pendant. While wearing it, you have Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Necrotic. When you drop to 0 Hit Points, the emblem shatters, and you drop to 1 Hit Point instead. The emblem is destroyed.
properties: Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Necrotic
Auto-save at 1 HP when dropped to 0

name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
description: This warhammer appears to be a mundane +1 warhammer. While wearing a Belt of Giant Strength and a Pair of Earth Gauntlets, the hammer becomes a +3 warhammer that deals extra 3d6 Thunder damage on a hit. You can use the hammer to call down lightning.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement (with Belt of Giant Strength and Earth Gauntlets)
properties: +3 when attuned with Belt of Giant Strength and Earth Gauntlets

name: Handy Haversack
description: This backpack has an interior space that is 2 feet deep, 3 feet wide, and 4 feet tall. It can hold up to 30 pounds. The haversack has 4 compartments, each with its own access door.

name: Hat of Disguise
description: This hat looks like a mundane cap. While wearing it, you can cast Disguise Self as a Magic action. The hat has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.
properties: Cast Disguise Self as Magic action

name: Headband of Intellect
description: Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband. It has no effect on you if your Intelligence is 19 or higher without it.

name: Helm of Brilliance
description: This helmet grants you a +2 bonus to Armor Class. While wearing it, you have Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Necrotic. You can cast various spells from the helm.
properties: Resistance to all damage except Psychic and Necrotic
Requires attunement by a Cleric, Druid, or Paladin

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
description: While wearing this helmet, you can cast Comprehend Languages at will.

name: Helm of Telepathy
description: While wearing this helmet, you can communicate telepathically with creatures within 60 feet of you. You can cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 13) with it.

name: Helm of Underwater Action
description: While wearing this helmet, you can breathe underwater. You also have a Swim Speed of 40 feet and can see clearly underwater up to 60 feet.
properties: See clearly underwater up to 60 feet

name: Holy Avenger
description: An Artifact. You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While you touch the sword with no other weapons or shields, you can cast Protection from Evil and Good. The sword emits a shimmering aura that repels Fiends and Undead.
properties: Cast Protection from Evil and Good
Sword is sentient and Lawful Good

name: Horn of Blasting
description: This horn has 3 charges. As a Magic action, you can blow the horn and expend 1 charge to create a Loud Sound that deals 6d6 Thunder damage to creatures within 30 feet. Creatures must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be Stunned until the end of their next turn.
properties: 6d6 Thunder damage to creatures within 30 feet

name: Horn of Valhalla (Bronze)
description: This horn has 3 charges. While holding it, you can blow the horn and expend 1 charge to summon 1d4 +1 Berserkers to fight for you for 1 hour. Each Berserker has AC 16, 26 Hit Points, and makes two attacks (1d8+3 Slashing damage each).

name: Horn of Valhalla (Golden)
description: This horn has 3 charges. While holding it, you can blow the horn and expend 1 charge to summon 2d4 +1 Elite Berserkers to fight for you for 1 hour. Each Elite Berserker has AC 18, 45 Hit Points, and makes three attacks (1d10+4 Slashing damage each).

name: Horn of Valhalla (Silver)
description: This horn has 3 charges. While holding it, you can blow the horn and expend 1 charge to summon 3d4 +1 Elite Berserkers to fight for you for 1 hour. Each Elite Berserker has AC 18, 52 Hit Points, and makes three attacks (1d10+5 Slashing damage each).

name: Horseshoes of Speed
description: While these horseshoes are nailed to a creature's hooves, the creature's Speed increases by 15 feet. The creature can't be restrained by nonmagical restraints.
properties: Can't be restrained by nonmagical restraints

name: Horseshoes of a Zephyr
description: While these horseshoes are nailed to a creature's hooves, the creature can walk on air as if it were solid ground. The creature can also fly with a Speed of 40 feet.
properties: Walk on air as if solid ground

name: Immovable Rod
description: This 2-foot-long rod has a rod action and a lever action. When you take a Magic action and press the rod action, the rod becomes immune to all movement, including gravity. The rod can hold up to 8,000 pounds.
properties: Has rod action and lever action

name: Instrument of the Bards (Baroque Bow)
description: This magical bow can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Carnival Action)
description: This magical instrument can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Conductor's Baton)
description: This magical baton can be used to conduct music. While conducting with it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Fanfare Horn)
description: This magical horn can be blown as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Fochlucan Bandore)
description: This magical bandore can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Maceman's Hammer)
description: This magical hammer can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Penelope's Pan Flute)
description: This magical pan flute can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Singularity Harp)
description: This magical harp can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Soul Singer's Instrument)
description: This magical instrument can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Instrument of the Bards (Thrum Baritone)
description: This magical baritone can be played as a musical instrument. While playing it, you can cast various spells. It has 7 charges and regains 1d7 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ioun Stone (Agile)
description: This star-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself a Fly Speed of 30 feet for 10 minutes. The stone regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ioun Stone (Dazzling)
description: This prism-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Blindness/Deafness (save DC 15) on a creature you can see within 60 feet of you.

name: Ioun Stone (Devoted)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Dispel Magic on yourself or a creature you touch.

name: Ioun Stone (Dignified)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Calm Emotions on creatures you can see within 30 feet of you.

name: Ioun Stone (Diligent)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 15) on a creature you can see within 60 feet of you.

name: Ioun Stone (Durable)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself Resistance to all damage except Psychic for 1 hour.
properties: Resistance to all damage except Psychic for 1 hour

name: Ioun Stone (Engraved)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Detect Magic on yourself or a creature you touch.

name: Ioun Stone (Fortified)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself 20 temporary Hit Points.

name: Ioun Stone (Fragrant)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Disguise Self on yourself.

name: Ioun Stone (Glossy)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Invisibility on yourself or a creature you touch.

name: Ioun Stone (Quick)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to take an additional turn on your turn order in the first round of combat.
properties: Additional turn in first round of combat

name: Ioun Stone (Resilient)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.
properties: Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour

name: Ioun Stone (Robust)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.
properties: Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour

name: Ioun Stone (Scarlet)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Cure Wounds on yourself or a creature you touch.

name: Ioun Stone (Splendid)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Levitate on yourself or a creature you touch.

name: Ioun Stone (Strong)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself a +1 bonus to AC for 1 hour.

name: Ioun Stone (Sublime)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Mass Cure Wounds.

name: Ioun Stone (Superior)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Mass Cure Wounds.

name: Ioun Stone (Supreme)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Mass Cure Wounds.

name: Ioun Stone (Vigilant)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Alarm on yourself.

name: Ioun Stone (Withered)
description: This cube-shaped stone has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Wither and Bloom on yourself or a creature you touch.

name: Iron Bands of Bilarro
description: These bands have 3 charges. When you throw them at a creature, they wrap around the target, restraining them. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be Restrained.
properties: Target can use action to break free (DC 20 Strength)

name: Mace of Disruption
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a Fiend or Undead with this weapon, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be destroyed.

name: Mace of Smiting
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, you can expend 1 charge to deal extra 3d6 Force damage.

name: Mace of Terror
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened of you until the end of your next turn.
properties: Frightened until end of next turn

name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
description: While wearing this cloak, you have Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
properties: Advantage on saving throws vs spells and magical effects

name: Manual of Bodily Health
description: This manual contains instructions for improving the body. A creature that studies the manual for 48 hours gains 2 points in Constitution, to a maximum of 24. The manual is consumed in the process.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
description: This manual contains instructions for improving the body. A creature that studies the manual for 48 hours gains 2 points in Strength, to a maximum of 24. The manual is consumed in the process.

name: Manual of Golems
description: This manual contains instructions for creating a specific type of Golem. A creature that studies the manual for 8 hours can create that type of Golem. The manual is destroyed in the process.
properties: Instructions for creating specific Golem type

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
description: This manual contains instructions for improving the body. A creature that studies the manual for 48 hours gains 2 points in Dexterity, to a maximum of 24. The manual is consumed in the process.

name: Marvelous Pigments
description: This pot contains enough paint to cover 5 square feet. The paint can be used to create magical images that appear real. The images last until the paint dries or for 1 hour.
properties: Images last 1 hour or until paint dries

name: Medallion of Thoughts
description: This medallion allows you to communicate telepathically with creatures within 60 feet of you. You can also cast Zone of Silence with it once per day.
properties: Cast Zone of Silence once per day

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
description: This mirror has a silver frame and a silvered glass surface. When a creature looks into the mirror, it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be trapped in the mirror. Trapped creatures can be freed by casting Remove Curse.
properties: DC 17 Wisdom save or trapped in mirror
Trapped creatures can be freed with Remove Curse

name: Mithral Armor
description: This armor is made of mithral, a lightweight and strong metal. You have a +1 bonus to Armor Class while wearing this armor. Your Speed isn't reduced by wearing Heavy Armor.
properties: Speed not reduced by Heavy Armor

name: Moonblade
description: An Artifact. This elf blade is a powerful magic weapon. You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The sword is sentient and has an intelligence of 16.

name: Necklace of Adaptation
description: While wearing this necklace, you have Resistance to one damage type chosen when the necklace is created. The damage type can be changed as a Magic action.
properties: Can change damage type as Magic action

name: Necklace of Fireballs
description: This necklace has 5 beads. Each bead functions as a Bead of Force when thrown. The necklace regains 1d3 expended beads daily at dawn.
properties: Each bead functions as Bead of Force

name: Necklace of Prayer Beads
description: This necklace has 7 beads. Each bead can be used to cast a spell. The beads regain their powers at dawn. Various spell combinations are available.

name: Nine Lives Stealer
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a creature with this weapon, you steal one of its lives. The creature must succeed on a DC 17 Charisma saving throw or be Charmed by you.

name: Nolzur's Marvelous Pigments
description: These pigments can be used to create nonmagical copies of any object. The copies last for 1 hour before fading away.

name: Oathbow
description: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls made with this magic weapon. When you make a ranged attack with this weapon, you can choose to make a special attack. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or take an extra 3d8 damage.
properties: DC 17 Wisdom save or extra damage

name: Oil of Etherealness
description: This viscous, green fluid has the consistency of olive oil. A creature that applies this oil to its skin or weapon becomes Ethereal for 1 hour.
properties: Can be applied to skin or weapon

name: Oil of Sharpness
description: This oil is used to coat a nonmagical weapon. The weapon becomes a +1 weapon for 1 hour. If the weapon is already magical, it becomes a +2 weapon.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
description: This crystal orb can be used to communicate with dragons. While holding it, you can cast Speak with Monsters on a Dragon. The orb has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Orb of Time
description: This orb can be used as an Arcane Focus. While holding the orb, you can take a Magic action to determine whether it is morning, afternoon, evening, or nighttime. This property functions only on the Material Plane.

name: Pearl of Power
description: While this pearl is on your person, you can take a Magic action to regain one expended spell slot of level 3 or lower. Once you use the pearl, it can't be used again until the next dawn.
properties: Regain expended spell slot of level 3 or lower

name: Perfume of Bewitching
description: This tiny vial contains magic perfume, enough for one use. You can take a Magic action to apply the perfume to yourself, and its effect lasts 1 hour. For the duration, you have Advantage on all Charisma (Deception and Persuasion) checks made to influence a creature within 5 feet of yourself.
properties: Advantage on Deception/Persuasion vs creatures within 5 ft

name: Periapt of Health
description: While wearing this pendant, you can take a Magic action to regain 2d4 + 2 Hit Points. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn. In addition, you have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition while you wear this pendant.
properties: Advantage on saves vs Poisoned condition

name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
description: This delicate silver chain has a brilliant-cut black gem pendant. While you wear it, you have Immunity to the Poisoned condition and Poison damage.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
description: While wearing this pendant, you gain the following benefits. Life Preservation. Whenever you make a Death Saving Throw, you can change a roll of 9 or lower to a 10, turning a failed save into a successful one. Natural Healing Boost. Whenever you roll a Hit Point Die to regain Hit Points, double the number of Hit Points it restores.
properties: Change Death Save 9 or lower to 10
Double HP restored from Hit Dice

name: Philter of Love
description: The next time you see a creature within 10 minutes after drinking this philter, you are charmed by that creature and have the Charmed condition for 1 hour. This rose-hued, effervescent liquid contains one easy-to-miss bubble shaped like a heart.
properties: Charmed by creature seen within 10 minutes

name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters
description: While smoking this pipe, you can take a Magic action to exhale a puff of smoke that takes the form of a creature, such as a dragon, a flumph, or a slaad. The form must be small enough to fit in a 1-foot cube and loses its shape after a few seconds, becoming an ordinary puff of smoke.

name: Pipes of Haunting
description: These pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can take a Magic action to play them and expend 1 charge to create an eerie, spellbinding tune. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet of you must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition for 1 minute. A creature that fails the save repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature that succeeds on its save is immune to the effect of these pipes for 24 hours.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
description: While these pipes are on your person, ordinary rats and giant rats are Indifferent toward you and won't attack you unless you threaten or harm them. The pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. If you play the pipes as a Magic action, you can take a Bonus Action to expend 1 to 3 charges, calling forth one Swarm of Rats with each expended charge if enough rats are within half a mile of you to be called in this fashion. On a failed save, the swarm is swayed by the pipes' music and becomes Friendly to you and your allies for as long as you continue to play the pipes each round as a Magic action.
properties: Rats and giant rats are Indifferent
Swarm becomes Friendly on failed save

name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
description: While you're wearing this armor, you can take a Magic action and use a command word to gain the effect of the Etherealness spell. The spell ends immediately if you remove the armor or take a Magic action to repeat the command word. This property of the armor can't be used again until the next dawn.
subtype: Half Plate Armor or Plate Armor

name: Pole of Angling
description: This item functions as a Pole. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to cause it to transform into a fishing pole with a hook, a line, and a reel, or have the fishing pole revert to a Pole.

name: Pole of Collapsing
description: This item functions as a Pole. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to collapse it into a 1-foot-long rod for ease of storage (the pole's weight doesn't change) or cause the 1-foot-long rod to revert to a Pole. The rod elongates only as far as the surrounding space allows.

name: Portable Hole
description: This fine black cloth, soft as silk, is folded up to the dimensions of a handkerchief. It unfolds into a circular sheet 6 feet in diameter. You can take a Magic action to unfold a Portable Hole and place it on or against a solid surface, whereupon the Portable Hole creates an extradimensional hole 10 feet deep. The hole weighs next to nothing, no matter what's in it. If the hole is folded up, a creature within the hole's extradimensional space can take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check to escape. A closed Portable Hole holds enough air for 1 hour of breathing, divided by the number of breathing creatures inside.

name: Pot of Awakening
description: If you plant an ordinary shrub in this 10-pound clay pot and let it grow for 30 days, the shrub magically transforms into an Awakened Shrub at the end of that time. When the shrub awakens, its roots break the pot, destroying it. The awakened shrub is Friendly toward you and obeys your commands.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
description: When you drink this potion, you can cast the level 3 version of the Animal Friendship spell (save DC 13). Agitating this potion's muddy liquid brings little bits into view: a fish scale, a hummingbird feather, a cat claw, or a squirrel hair.

name: Potion of Clairvoyance
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Clairvoyance spell (no Concentration required). An eyeball bobs in this potion's yellowish liquid but vanishes when the potion is opened.

name: Potion of Climbing
description: When you drink this potion, you gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed for 1 hour. During this time, you have Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to climb. This potion is separated into brown, silver, and gray layers resembling bands of stone.
properties: Climb Speed equal to your Speed
Advantage on Athletics checks to climb

name: Potion of Comprehension
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Comprehend Languages spell for 1 hour. This potion's liquid is a clear concoction with bits of salt and soot swirling in it.

name: Potion of Diminution
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the 'reduce' effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no Concentration required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously contracts to a tiny bead and then expands to color the clear liquid around it.

name: Potion of Etherealness
description: When you drink this potion, you become Ethereal for 1 hour. You can end this effect early as a Magic action.
properties: Can end effect early as Magic action

name: Potion of Fire Breath
description: After drinking this potion, you can take a Bonus Action to exhale fire at a target within 30 feet of yourself. The target makes a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The effect ends after you exhale the fire three times or when 1 hour has passed. This potion's orange liquid flickers, and smoke fills the top of the container.

name: Potion of Flying
description: When you drink this potion, you gain a Fly Speed equal to your Speed for 1 hour and can hover. If you're in the air when the potion wears off, you fall unless you have some other means of staying aloft. This potion's clear liquid floats at the top of its container.
properties: Fly Speed equal to your Speed

name: Potion of Gaseous Form
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Gaseous Form spell for 1 hour (no Concentration required) or until you end the effect as a Bonus Action. This potion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.

name: Potion of Giant Strength
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score changes for 1 hour. The type of giant determines the score (see the table below). The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score. This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of light resembling a giant's fingernail.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Black)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 25 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Hill Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Cloud)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 31 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Cloud Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Fire)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 29 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Fire Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Frost)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 27 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Frost Giant.

name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score becomes 33 for 1 hour. This is the strength of a Storm Giant.

name: Potion of Greater Invisibility
description: When you drink the potion, you have the Invisible condition for 1 hour. This potion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid.
properties: No effect from attacks or spells

name: Potion of Growth
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the 'enlarge' effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 10 minutes (no Concentration required). The red in the potion's liquid continuously expands from a tiny bead to color the clear liquid around it.

name: Potion of Healing
description: You regain Hit Points when you drink this potion. The number of Hit Points depends on the potion's rarity, as shown in the table below. Whatever its potency, the potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

name: Potion of Heroism
description: When you drink this potion, you gain 10 Temporary Hit Points that last for 1 hour. For the same duration, you are under the effect of the Bless spell (no Concentration required). This potion's blue liquid bubbles and steams as if boiling.

name: Potion of Invisibility
description: When you drink the potion, you have the Invisible condition for 1 hour. The effect ends early if you make an attack roll, deal damage, or cast a spell. This potion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid.
properties: Effect ends on attack, damage, or spell

name: Potion of Invulnerability
description: For 1 minute after you drink this potion, you have Resistance to all damage. This potion's syrupy liquid looks like liquefied iron.

name: Potion of Longevity
description: When you drink this potion, your physical age is reduced by 1d6 + 6 years, to a minimum of 13 years. Each time you subsequently drink a Potion of Longevity, there is 10 percent cumulative chance that you instead age by 1d6 + 6 years. Suspended in this amber liquid is a tiny heart that, against all reason, is still beating.

name: Potion of Mind Reading
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Detect Thoughts spell (save DC 13) for 10 minutes (no Concentration required). This potion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.

name: Potion of Poison (greater)
description: This concoction looks, smells, and tastes like a Potion of Healing or another beneficial potion. However, it is actually poison masked by illusion magic. Identify reveals its true nature. If you drink this potion, you take 4d6 Poison damage and must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or have the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.
properties: Poisoned condition for 1 hour (DC 13 Con save)

name: Potion of Pugilism
description: After you drink this potion, each Unarmed Strike you make deals an extra 1d6 Force damage on a hit. This effect lasts 10 minutes. This potion is a thick green fluid that tastes like spinach.
properties: Extra 1d6 Force damage on Unarmed Strikes

name: Potion of Resistance
description: When you drink this potion, you have Resistance to one type of damage for 1 hour. The DM chooses the type or determines it randomly by rolling on the table. The table includes Acid, Cold, Fire, Force, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, and Thunder.

name: Potion of Speed
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute (no Concentration required) without suffering the wave of lethargy that typically occurs when the effect ends. This potion's yellow fluid is streaked with black and swirls on its own.

name: Potion of Vitality
description: When you drink this potion, it removes any Exhaustion levels you have and ends the Poisoned condition on you. For the next 24 hours, you regain the maximum number of Hit Points for any Hit Point Die you spend. This potion's crimson liquid regularly pulses with dull light, calling to mind a heartbeat.
properties: Regain max HP from Hit Dice for 24 hours

name: Potion of Water Breathing
description: You can breathe underwater for 24 hours after drinking this potion. This potion's cloudy green fluid smells of the sea and has a jellyfish-like bubble floating in it.

name: Prosthetic Limb
description: This magic item replaces a lost limb---a hand, an arm, a foot, a leg, or a similar body part. While the prosthetic is attached, it functions identically to the part it replaces. You can detach or reattach it as a Magic action, and it can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

name: Quaal's Feather Token
description: This object looks like a feather. Different types of feather tokens exist, each with a different single-use effect. The DM chooses the kind of token or determines it randomly by rolling on the Quaal's Feather Tokens table.
properties: Anchor (Uncommon): Vessel can't be moved for 24 hours
Fan (Uncommon): Creates wind for ship sails
Swan Boat (Rare): 50-foot swan boat for 24 hours

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Bird)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Eagle. The eagle obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Blade)
description: This token can be thrown to create a +1 Longsword. The sword hovers in the air and can attack creatures.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Fan)
description: This token can be thrown to create a cloud of scentless smoke in a 20-foot radius. The cloud obscures vision and can be commanded to move.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Hippopotus)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Hippopotamus. The hippopotamus obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Snake)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Constrictor Snake. The snake obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Swan)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Swan. The swan can carry you and others on its back for 1 hour.
properties: Can carry creatures on back for 1 hour

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Unicorn)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Unicorn. The unicorn obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quaal's Feather Token (Winged Bear)
description: This token can be thrown to create a Giant Badger with wings. The bear obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Quarterstaff of the Acrobat
description: You have a +2 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While holding this weapon, you can cause it to emit green Dim Light out to 10 feet, either as a Bonus Action or after you roll Initiative. While holding this weapon, you can take a Bonus Action to alter its form, turning it into a 6-inch rod or a 10-foot pole. Acrobatic Assist (Quarterstaff or 10-Foot Pole Forms): Advantage on Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks. Attack Deflection (Quarterstaff Form): +5 AC against triggering attack. Ranged Weapon (Quarterstaff Form): Thrown (30/120 ft), returns to hand.

name: Quiver of Ehlonna
description: Each of the quiver's three compartments connects to an extradimensional space that allows the quiver to hold numerous items while never weighing more than 2 pounds. The shortest compartment can hold up to 60 Arrows, Bolts, or similar objects. The mid-size compartment holds up to 18 Javelins or similar objects. The longest compartment holds up to 6 long objects, such as bows, Quarterstaffs, or Spears. You can draw any item the quiver contains as if doing so from a regular quiver or scabbard.

name: Ring of Animal Influence
description: While wearing this ring, you can cast Animal Friendship or Speak with Animals. The ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Ring of Djinni Summoning
description: This ring has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to summon a Djinni. The Djinni obeys your commands for 1 hour.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Air)
description: This ring allows you to command Air Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon an Air Elemental.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Earth)
description: This ring allows you to command Earth Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon an Earth Elemental.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Fire)
description: This ring allows you to command Fire Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon a Fire Elemental.

name: Ring of Elemental Command (Water)
description: This ring allows you to command Water Elementals. You can cast Conjure Elemental to summon a Water Elemental.

name: Ring of Evasion
description: While wearing this ring, you have Advantage on Dexterity saving throws. When you make a Dexterity saving throw and take half damage on a successful save, you can take no damage instead.
properties: Take no damage on successful Dex saves

If you succeed on a saving throw against an Enchantment spell that targets only you, you can take a Reaction to expend 1 charge from the staff and turn the spell back on its caster as if you had cast the spell. Resist Enchantment. If you fail a saving throw against an Enchantment spell that targets only you, you can turn your failed save into a successful one.

properties: 5% chance of explosion if last charge used

name: Rod of Fire

The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll 1d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles into cinders and is destroyed.

name: Rod of Frost

The staff regains 1d6+4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll 1d20. On a 1, the staff turns to water and is destroyed.
attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

attunement_requirements: Requires Attunement by a Bard, Cleric, or Druid
